case_title: NEIL SHANKAR VS. PRIZM LABS INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHANKAR, NEIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRIZM LABS INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $754.79 INTEREST, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,819.79, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $5000.00 PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FROM 4/2/2017 (AND COSTS). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-15-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRIZM LABS INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/9/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NEIL SHANKAR. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SHANKAR, NEIL AS TO DEFENDANT PRIZM LABS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANKAR, NEIL AS TO DEFENDANT PRIZM LABS INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
